steps.title: Identify the point values
steps.content: Each draw earns 1 point, so $d$ draws contribute $1 \cdot d = d$ points. Each win earns 4 points, so $w$ wins contribute $4w$ points.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: $\frac{d}{4} + w = 28$ — This divides draws by 4 and treats each win as 1 point, using the point values incorrectly. Eliminated.
  • B: $d + \frac{w}{4} = 28$ — This divides wins by 4 instead of multiplying, giving $\frac{1}{4}$ point per win. Eliminated.
  • C: $d + w = 28$ — This treats every match as worth 1 point regardless of draw or win. Eliminated.
  • D: $d + 4w = 28$ — 1 point per draw plus 4 points per win equals 28. D is correct.
